title: Skin abscess
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: A skin abscess is a collection of pus in or on the skin.
Symptoms may include local redness, tenderness, warmth, swelling, pus drainage, fever, or chills.
Patients should seek care for new symptoms during or after treatment.
